data.title: "Influential Women exceeds 50K LinkedIn followers, a milestone in platform growth spotlighting women leaders. -PRNewswire"
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on January 29, 2026, Influential Women, a rapidly expanding media platform that features women leaders, founders, and experts from various fields, has recently reached over 50,000 followers on LinkedIn. This achievement signifies a significant milestone in the platform's ongoing growth and impact.

data.title: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges Semtech Corporation shareholders to discuss their rights with the firm quickly.
data.description: If you are a shareholder of Semtech Corporation (NASDAQ: SMTC), it is advised to promptly reach out to the company. An investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, has initiated an inquiry into specific officers and directors of Semtech Corporation on January 29, 2026. This investigation aims to ascertain any potential breaches by the aforementioned individuals that could impact the rights of investors. Time constraints may apply to take action, hence the urgency in contacting the firm.

data.title: The Olympic Truce begins on January 30, with the Truce Foundation introducing an Online Truce Compliance Index.
data.description: The "Geolympics" explores the impact of the Olympic Truce on geopolitics as The Truce Foundation introduces the Online Truce Compliance Index. This index monitors nations' adherence to the Olympic Truce, upholding a tradition that dates back 2,800 years. In a recent development in Milan on Jan. 29, 2026, the foundation aims to bring accountability to this ancient practice.

data.title: Kansas House passes HB 2476, supporting farmers' access to essential crop protection tools - critical for agriculture.
data.description: The passage of HB 2476 by the House of Representatives in Kansas demonstrates their support for farmers by protecting vital agricultural tools. This significant bill secures farmers' access to crucial crop protection methods. The vote took place on Jan. 29, 2026, in Omaha, Nebraska. This legislation aims to safeguard farmers' ability to utilize essential tools for crop management.

data.title: Rithm Capital Corp declared taxable dividends of $1 per share for its common stock in 2025.
data.description: In New York, Rithm Capital Corp. (NYSE:RITM) disclosed the tax implications for its common and preferred stock dividends subject to taxation in 2025. Reportedly, taxable dividends for Rithm Capital's common stock (CUSIP #64828T201) for the year amount to around $1.00000 per share. The tax breakdown for common stock distributions during the year is outlined below: Record Date / Pay Date (1), Form, Ordinary Dividend, and Qualified Dividend.

data.title: MFA Financial, Inc. (NYSE: MFA) posts dividend tax info for 2025 on website www.mfafinancial.com. Stockholders report distributions on 2025 tax returns.
data.description: In New York, MFA Financial, Inc. (NYSE: MFA) has revealed details about its dividend distributions for the tax year ending December 31, 2025. Information on all common stock dividend payments made throughout 2025 can be found on the company's website at www.mfafinancial.com. Shareholders are advised that these distributions must be reported on their 2025 federal income tax returns. As per the federal income tax regulations for real estate investment trusts (“REITs”), it is anticipated that MFA’s common stock dividend distributions for 2025 will be subject to these rules.

data.title: FIS raises quarterly dividend by 10% to $0.44 per common share, payable on March 24, 2026, for shareholders on record by March 10, 2026.
data.description: Financial technology company FIS has revealed a 10% hike in its regular quarterly dividend to $0.44 per common share. This increased dividend will be paid out on March 24, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 10, 2026. FIS, listed on the NYSE as FIS, is a leading provider of financial services technology to financial institutions, businesses, and developers, bridging the gap between financial technology and the global market.

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) reported Q4 2025 earnings per share of $1.19, or $1.27 excluding special items.
data.description: In New York on January 29, 2026, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) announced their quarterly earnings. The company, known for their specialty minerals and technology-driven approach, revealed that their earnings per share for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2025, were $1.19. However, excluding special items, this figure stood at $1.27.

data.title: Sagen MI Canada Inc. reports Q4 2025 net income of $162 million, down $0.6 million y-o-y. Dividend of $0.3375 per preferred share declared.
data.description: In Toronto on January 29, 2026, Sagen MI Canada Inc. (TSX: MIC) released their financial report for the fourth quarter of 2025, disclosing a net income of $162 million. This amount marked a $0.6 million decrease from the previous year's fourth quarter, mainly attributed to reduced investment income and higher insurance finance costs. However, this was partly offset by improved insurance service outcomes. The company's Board of Directors also declared a dividend of $0.3375 per Class A preferred share, Series 1, scheduled to be paid on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 13, 2026. Sagen MI Canada Inc. announced this update without specifying the source.
All-time high production and significant cash increase in the last quarter.

data.title: Ovintiv appoints Gregory P. Hill, 64, as independent board member effective Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Ovintiv Inc. (NYSE: OVV) (TSX: OVV) revealed that Gregory P. Hill, aged 64, has been designated as an independent member of its board of directors, starting from January 30, 2026. Hill, who retired in 2025 as President, Worldwide Exploration & Production, joins the board at Ovintiv to contribute his expertise and insights.
